name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, compliance gaps cause potential fines and project delays. We automate OSHA compliance checklist preparation instead of manual checklist creation and tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in ensuring OSHA compliance across multiple projects.
